title: Stdlib stubs — lists, maps, timer as native BIFs
purpose: gleam_erlang_ffi and gleam_otp import OTP stdlib functions. Implement as native Rust stubs with correct semantics rather than loading OTP .beam files.
task: Implement lists:map/2, lists:foldr/3, lists:reverse/1, maps:from_list/1, maps:map/2, maps:merge/2, maps:remove/2, timer:sleep/1 in stdlib_stubs.rs.
boundaries: Only functions imported by gleam_otp — not full stdlib
SHALL NOT implement io:* or string:* (separate brief)

requirements.title: lists module stubs
requirements.spec: Implement lists:map/2, lists:foldr/3, lists:reverse/1 with correct semantics on proper lists.

requirements.title: maps module stubs
acceptance: maps:merge(M1, M2) merges with M2 priority

requirements.title: timer:sleep/1
requirements.spec: timer:sleep/1 suspends the calling process for N milliseconds, returns ok.
acceptance: All stubs registered under OTP module names
